description: Fun, style and comfort are the highlights of this messenger bag from lee. Carry it to college, office or for a casual day out with friends. A good looking bag with lots of space, it is sure to accommodate everything you think of, while you strut around looking super cool!Made of tough fabric for enhanced durability with print on the frontFlap on top with button closureAdjustable shoulder strapOne main compartment with a zippered pocketOne pocket in the frontCareDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
